intro: Get ready to twist, flip, and fly — gravity is no match for your wheels!
description:
Defy gravity and race through thrilling obstacle courses in Gravity Biker! Hop on your futuristic bike and master the art of balance, timing, and precision as you perform daring jumps, flips, and stunts across challenging tracks.

Each level brings new obstacles, traps, and surprises — can you keep your wheels on the ground and make it to the finish line? Collect boosts, pull off smooth landings, and push your skills to the limit in this fast-paced physics-based adventure.

With colorful cartoon visuals, easy-to-learn controls, and addictive gameplay, Gravity Biker is perfect for players who love speed, stunts, and a good challenge.
